findings.evidence: `rg -n "preimage_.*exchangeable|preimage_shift_iterate"` shows line 145 has no attribute, while the parallel `MeasurableSet.preimage_shift_iterate_eq_of_shiftInvariantSigma` in `TauCeti/Probability/Ergodic/ShiftInvariantSigma.lean:81` is tagged `@[simp]`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to this theorem if simp can discharge the finite-support side condition from context, matching the shift-invariant API.
findings.issue: `MeasurableSet.preimage_permReindex_eq_of_exchangeableSigma` is the normal-form lemma for exchangeable events under finitely supported reindexing, but it is not tagged `@[simp]`, so downstream users must manually rewrite the defining invariant property.

summary: The main exchangeable σ-algebra API is present, but one normal-form elimination lemma is missing the automation annotation expected from the parallel invariant-sigma API.
